calendar.matters:
ADDED TO CALENDAR FOR Status Of Close Of The Estate
Off Calendar Jun-20-2022 Off Calendar

ACCOUNTING PETITION RE: Report, Fees, Final Distribution
Off Calendar Nov-10-2021 Granted Per Written Order

PETITION FOR PROBATE OF WILL AND FOR LETTERS TESTAMENTARY
Off Calendar Dec-21-2020 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Diana Redding, Esq., counsel for Richard Lee, Petitioner (appearing by telephone).

The Court notes review of Probate Code Sec. 6124 regarding the admission of lost Wills and the presumptions pertaining thereto. Upon general query and hearing no objection, the Court accepts the proffered Will, determines that the Petitioner has overcome the presumptions of Probate Code Sec. 6124, and admits the Will dated October 16, 2012 to probate as a lost Will. Richard Lee is appointed the Executor of the estate with full authority under the Independent Administration of Estates Act. Bond is waived. Order for the same signed in open Court. Status on close of estate is set for hearing on June 20, 2022 at 9:00 a.m. in Dept. 204.

Judge: Hon. Ross C. Moody; Clerk: R. Michael Diles; Bailiff: Deputy Rosado. Reporter: Not Reported. (D204)
